title: JARVIS Docs Index / Command Center Manual

overview.purpose: A cinematic, read-only command center that aggregates the state of the SPARTA_BRAIN system (server, AI brains, trading research, content/money/moving engines, git, safety posture, cached reports, and operator docs) into one dashboard.
allowed: Read and display aggregated status from /api/jarvis/status (GET only).
Display cached reports written offline by manual tools.
Display tracked documentation JSON (mission board, prompt library, system map).
Poll the status endpoint on a timer for a live read-only view.
not_allowed: Execute commands or scripts from the browser.
Clean, stage, delete, move, or write any file from the web.
Run tests or probes from the web route.
Execute any prompt or mission text.
Control a broker, place paper/live trades, or expose any order path.
Upload, deploy, push, or fire automation.

commit_timeline.purpose: Add JARVIS command center release note
Step 13 refresh mission board and prompt library

main_code_files.purpose: FastAPI app. Holds the _jarvis_* read-only helpers, the GET /api/jarvis/status aggregate endpoint, and the GET /jarvis page route.
Cinematic read-only dashboard template. Single GET fetch to /api/jarvis/status; no buttons, forms, onclick, or POST.
JARVIS route + reader test suite (98 tests). Run scoped with --rootdir=tests.

tracked_data_doc_files.purpose: Original release note for the command center.
Display-only operator prompt library (10 read-only prompts).
Display-only wiring map: 21 panels (each with api_key), 3 scripts, tracked/ignored file lists.
Step 11 hardening audit memo (human-readable). Conclusion: JARVIS_HARDENING_PASS.
This docs index / command center manual (human-readable).

manual_only_scripts.purpose: Offline compile/test health report. Manual only; never run from the web.
Offline GET-only route smoke report. Manual only; never run from the web.
Offline git/untracked hygiene summary. Manual only; never run from the web.

safety_rules: No paper or live trading controls.
No file cleanup, stage, or delete controls.
The web route reads only; every section is fail-closed via _jarvis_safe.
known_warnings: commander_snapshot may show yellow due to the large untracked-file backlog and a dirty working tree (conservative by design, not an error).
/money-spartan may report a non-required 404 in the route smoke report.
A corrupted 'hydra ' directory can break bare pytest collection, so always use the scoped JARVIS pytest command (--rootdir=tests).
